- [x] Compile the Project — ran `npm run lint` to validate TypeScript and lint rules.

- [x] Create and Run Task — not required; no additional VS Code task needed beyond npm scripts.

- [ ] Launch the Project — pending user confirmation before running `npm run dev`.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete — README refreshed, `.env.example` synced, and this checklist cleaned of comments.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
